Thanks for contributing to draftLegal! A few quick things:

- Keep PRs focused — one concern per PR is easiest to review and merge.
-->

## What does this PR do?

<!-- A clear, one-paragraph summary. Link the issue it closes. -->

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ⚖️ Legal content (template / clause / playbook)
- [ ] 📝 Docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore

## How was it tested?

<!-- Tell us how you verified this works. For UI changes, a screenshot or GIF is gold. -->

- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes (if applicable)
- [ ] Tested manually (describe below)

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- For any UI change. Drag images/GIFs right in. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] My change is focused (one concern)
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior changed
- [ ] I'll sign the CLA when prompted (first-time contributors)
